MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-22-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF 232-21ST AVENUE LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE RAISING A TRIABLE ISSUE AS TO ANY FACT MATERIAL TO PLAINTIFF HAVING DULY PURCHASED THE PROPERTY PURSUANT TO SUFFICIENT NOTICES. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
